changeSet.author: khapal
changeSet.sql:
IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.trg_UpdateEdgesCount', 'TR') IS NOT NULL DROP TRIGGER dbo.trg_UpdateEdgesCount; EXEC(' CREATE TRIGGER dbo.trg_UpdateEdgesCount ON dbo.Edges AFTER INSERT, DELETE AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON; IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM inserted) UPDATE g SET g.edges_count = g.edges_count + count_table.cnt FROM dbo.graph g JOIN (SELECT graph_id, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM inserted GROUP BY graph_id) count_table ON g.graph_id = count_table.graph_id;
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM deleted) UPDATE g SET g.edges_count = g.edges_count - count_table.cnt FROM dbo.graph g JOIN (SELECT graph_id, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deleted GROUP BY graph_id) count_table ON g.graph_id = count_table.graph_id; END ');
